title: Walrus Guy Memorial Day Special: Walrus Guy Releases his Last YTP [Youtube Poop Central Reports]
description:
For YouTube Poop Central TV go to:  http://www.livestream.com/youtubepoopcentral/
July 1st, 2009 will be marked in Youtube Poop history forever. One of YTPs founding fathers and a pioneer in Youtube Pooping called it quits. He released his last "poop" a later. I have put the video in here.
RIP Walrus Guy's Youtube Poops
Hello, NAveryW
